title: Indulgent Creamy Thai Bramley Apples Fried Rice
description: A malty and creamy Thai dish featuring Bramley apples, this recipe is a unique twist on traditional fried rice, incorporating macrobiotic-friendly ingredients for a guilt-free indulgence.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced Bramley apples and cook until they start to soften, about 2 minutes.
Add the cooked and cooled Thai jasmine rice to the skillet, stirring to combine with the apple and onion mixture.
Add the Thai red curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Pour in the coconut milk and stir to combine, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with soy sauce and salt to taste.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter and garnish with chopped peanuts.
